python_pydantic_ai.prompt: tell me a one sentence story about a robot
python_pydantic_ai.text: The robot spent its final battery cycle watching the sunset, finally understanding why humans wrote so much poetry about the light.

python_pydantic_ai.text: Recent news and discussions regarding local LLMs highlight a significant rise in community development and the increasing ease of running capable models on local hardware, presenting new opportunities for privacy and specialized use cases.
